nodes.name: Fetch Tender Document
nodes.notes: Fetches the full Structured Document Object from FastAPI. Expects shape: { id, tender_id, page_blocks: [{ page_num, block_index, text, block_type, confidence }] }

nodes.name: Concatenate & Trim Text
nodes.notes: Joins all blocks in page order. If text exceeds ~12k tokens, filters to eligibility-relevant blocks only. Logs truncation flag for audit.

nodes.name: Extract Criteria (Mistral)
nodes.notes: Timeout 120s — Mistral on CPU takes 30–90s on long prompts. Temperature 0.1 for near-deterministic JSON output.

nodes.name: Parse & Validate JSON
nodes.notes: Strips fences, isolates array, fixes trailing commas and single quotes, validates required fields. Returns parse_error:true on any failure so the IF node can route to retry.

nodes.name: Retry — Strict Prompt
nodes.notes: Retry with temperature 0.0 and more aggressive JSON-only instruction. Passes the failed raw output and error message so the model knows what to fix.

nodes.name: POST Failure to FastAPI
nodes.notes: Tells FastAPI both attempts failed. UI will show a manual criteria entry form as fallback. Evaluation cannot proceed until officer manually enters criteria.

nodes.name: Assign UUIDs & Metadata
nodes.notes: Adds UUID per criterion, order_index for stable sorting, status:pending_review so officer must confirm before WF-3 starts, and requires_human_review flag for ambiguous mandatory fields.

nodes.name: POST Criteria to FastAPI
nodes.notes: FastAPI stores criteria in the criteria table. UI polls for status change from 'processing' to 'pending_review' and shows the criteria list to the officer.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "tender_id": "{{ $('Assign UUIDs & Metadata').first().json.tender_id }}",
  "event_type": "criteria_extraction_complete",
  "actor": "n8n_wf2",
  "entity_type": "tender",
  "entity_id": "{{ $('Assign UUIDs & Metadata').first().json.tender_id }}",
  "detail": "{{ 'Extracted ' + $('Assign UUIDs & Metadata').first().json._audit.total + ' criteria from document ' + $('Assign UUIDs & Metadata').first().json._audit.document_id }}"
}
